name: I'm on ledge 8 feet below hill summit
description: I'm on ledge 8 feet below hill summit
hints: You're on a ledge just below the hilltop. You need to get up to the summit somehow.
Be very specific about where you want to jump. A bare JUMP is dangerous.
JUMP TOP or JUMP UP safely reaches the summit (room 7). Plain JUMP causes you to fall to your death! DOWN returns to the beach.
Always use JUMP TOP or JUMP UP here. Never use plain JUMP - it's fatal. DOWN goes back to the beach (room 5).
notes: Ledge below the hilltop. JUMP TOP or JUMP UP safely reach the summit (room 7). Plain JUMP is FATAL - you fall to your death. DOWN goes back to beach (room 5). Classic Scott Adams trap where specificity matters.
